ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "pmid" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Unique Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal in which the publication was published */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label categorizing the research topic */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of publication */,
  "author_ids" TEXT /* List of author IDs for the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Array of keywords for better categorization and search */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "doi_url" TEXT /* URL for the DOI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication was last updated */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the publication is open access */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Array of funding sources for the research */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Array of research areas for the publication */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., published, in review, withdrawn) */,
  "editorial_comments" TEXT /* Comments from journal editors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_ids FOREIGN KEY ("author_ids") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Array of author IDs for frequent collaborators */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author's information was last updated */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications authored */,
  "citations_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the author */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Array of research areas the author specializes in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor responsible for the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* Electronic International Standard Serial Number */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the journal's website */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the journal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the journal was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the journal's information was last updated */,
  "submission_guidelines_url" TEXT /* URL for the journal's submission guidelines */,
  "peer_review_process" TEXT /* Description of the journal's peer review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, editor, librarian) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is active */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user receives notifications */,
  "subscriptions" TEXT /* Array of publication IDs the user is subscribed to */,
  "annotations_count" INTEGER /* Number of annotations the user has made */,
  "discussions_count" INTEGER /* Number of discussions the user has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
